name: Flins
title: "Shadowy Lights, Stranger Wights" Flins
desc: The graven light leads into fathomless night.

attributes.source: Reward for inviting Flins to a duel at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with him

skills.name: Ancient Rite: Arcane Light
skills.desc: The first time this Skill is used each Round, deal ? ? and attach Manifest Flame to this character. When this Skill is used again, consume 2 Energy and this character prepares: Thunderous Symphony.

skills.name: Ancient Ritual: Cometh the Night
skills.desc: Deals ? ?, deals 2 Piercing DMG to all opposing characters on standby.

skills.name: Moonsign Benediction: Old World Secrets
skills.desc:
(Passive) During this game, when your opponent is affected by Electro-Charged reaction(s), the reaction will be converted to the Lunar-Charged reaction.
When this character is on the field, and Electric Shock is attached to the opponent's Action Card: Deal 1 Piercing DMG to the opposing character with the highest HP.
